creator: dsh@bamus.cz
text:
Created attachment 256761
nerd-fonts-symbols.patch

This patch adds 2 radio options: ALL and SYMBOLS. ALL is enabled by default and
installs all nerd fonts as before. SYMBOLS options installs only one font:
"Symbols Nerd Font". fontconfig can be configured to use this font as a
fallback, to render nerd icons.
